channel.title: LaunchpadX
channel.description: Updates for LaunchpadX — the Launchpad replacement for macOS Tahoe.

item.title: Version 1.2.1
item.description:
LaunchpadX 1.2.1

Changed

  • Opening a folder now settles its icons in a gentle wave — the top row lands

first and each row below ripples in just behind it, instead of every icon

arriving at once. Closing collapses back the same way.

Fixed

  • The app could freeze completely on launch (clicks and shortcuts dead, force

quit required) when the updater hit an error behind the full-screen launcher.

Updater problems no longer block the app, and update windows now appear in

front of the launcher instead of invisibly behind it.

  • If the app ever stalled, it could take the whole Mac's keyboard and trackpad

down with it — only the cursor kept moving, and a restart was the only way

out. The app's shortcut and pinch listeners now run independently, so a

stall in the app can no longer freeze input for the rest of the Mac.

item.title: Version 1.2
item.description:
LaunchpadX 1.2

Added

  • Full-screen Launchpad overlay: drag apps into folders, arrange them across

pages, open with a global hotkey, the menu-bar icon, or a four-finger pinch.

  • Fuzzy search (⌘F) — multi-word abbreviations work, e.g. "cur pr" finds

"Cursor Pro".

  • Folders open into a glass shelf with a smooth spring animation.
  • Settings window (General / Advanced / About) with a customizable hotkey and a

wallpaper-blur toggle.

  • Check for updates: from the menu-bar icon or Settings, LaunchpadX can now find

and install new versions, with an option to check automatically.

Changed

  • The launcher keeps the Dock visible and hides the menu bar while open, matching

native Launchpad.

  • The hotkey field now has an in-field × button to clear the shortcut, replacing

the old reset-to-default button.

  • Live video wallpapers show through the blurred backdrop.

Fixed

  • Faster overlay open and folder shelf open (icon caching + off-main app scan).
  • Smoother page swiping; page-indicator dots are now clickable.
  • App icons no longer blink when switching pages.
  • Correct, up-to-date wallpaper on open (no more stale/old wallpaper).
  • App names always show, even for bundles with an empty name field.

<!--

Template for future entries — keep only the groups you use:

item.title: Version 1.1
item.description:
LaunchpadX 1.1

A test update to prove the self-update loop works end to end.

item.title: Version 1.0
item.description:
LaunchpadX 1.0

First release — the Launchpad replacement for macOS Tahoe.

  • Full-screen app grid with drag-to-folder.
  • Fuzzy search, pages, live wallpaper backdrop.
  • Open with a hotkey, the menu-bar icon, or a four-finger pinch.
